---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that jmp doesn't currently support?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or behavior you'd like.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else useful (examples from z / zoxide / fasd, screenshots, etc.).
